entities.name: Build Capability
entities.context: Workflow that initializes builds for capabilities/features/systems, creates workspace and coordinates planning/execution

entities.name: Architect
entities.context: Persona that creates plans during build initialization

entities.name: Builder
entities.context: Persona that executes plans after Architect creates them

entities.name: V
entities.context: User who triggers builds by saying 'build X' or 'I want to add capability Y'

relationships.context: Activates Architect to create plan during build initialization
Routes to Builder for execution after planning
Sequential workflow - Architect plans, then Builder executes
